Class AdminService

java.lang.Object
ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.AdminService
@Service public class AdminService extends Object
Service class for admin user and organization management.

Handles creation, role updates, active status toggling, and deletion of users within an organization, as well as creation of new organizations. All operations that modify users are scoped to the authenticated admin's organization.

Referential integrity is enforced before user deletion — users with existing logs or deviations cannot be deleted and must be deactivated instead.

  • Constructor Details

    • AdminService

      public AdminService()

  • Method Details

    • getAllUsers

      public List<Map<String,Object>> getAllUsers(User currentUser)
      Returns all users in the authenticated admin's organization.
      Parameters:
      currentUser - the authenticated admin
      Returns:
      a list of maps containing each user's id, email, role, and active status

    • createUser

      public Map<String,Object> createUser(AdminCreateUserRequest request, User currentUser)
      Creates a new user in the same organization as the authenticated admin. The organization is always taken from the admin's JWT, never from the request body.
      Parameters:
      request - the user details to create
      currentUser - the authenticated admin performing the action
      Returns:
      a map with the created user's id, email, role, and active status
      Throws:
      ResourceConflictException - if the email address is already in use

    • createOrganization

      @Transactional public Map<String,Object> createOrganization(AdminCreateOrganizationRequest request)
      Creates a new organization and an initial admin user for it.
      Parameters:
      request - contains the organization name and the admin user's email and password
      Returns:
      a map with the created organization's id and name, and the admin's email and role
      Throws:
      ResourceConflictException - if the admin email address is already in use

    • updateUserRole

      public Map<String,Object> updateUserRole(Long userId, AdminUpdateRoleRequest request)
      Updates the role of an existing user.

      Prevents downgrading the last active admin in an organization to a non-admin role, ensuring at least one admin always remains.

      Parameters:
      userId - the ID of the user to update
      request - the request body containing the new role
      Returns:
      a map with the updated user's id, email, role, and active status
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if no user with the given ID exists
      ResourceConflictException - if the user is the last admin in the organization

    • toggleUserActive

      public Map<String,Object> toggleUserActive(Long userId, AdminToggleActiveRequest request)
      Activates or deactivates a user account.
      Parameters:
      userId - the ID of the user to update
      request - the request body containing the new active status
      Returns:
      a map with the updated user's id, email, role, and active status
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if no user with the given ID exists

    • deleteUser

      public void deleteUser(Long userId)
      Deletes a user by ID.

      Checks for existing references across all log and deviation tables before deletion. If the user has recorded any logs or deviations, deletion is rejected and the admin is instructed to deactivate the user instead.

      Parameters:
      userId - the ID of the user to delete
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if no user with the given ID exists
      ResourceConflictException - if the user has existing logs or deviations
